title: Pacific Blackout
writer: Franz Schulz, Curt Siodmak, Lester Cole
actors: Robert Preston, Martha O'Driscoll, Philip Merivale
plot: While bombers roar overhead during a practice blackout in a large American West coast city, Robert Draper, is among the prisoners in a police van. The inventor of a new range finder for anti-aircraft guns, he has been sentenced to...
